doc describes the main Usage Analysis application; feature is 'the main admin application that provides a unified dashboard for platform telemetry'

doc covers monitoring user activity; user-session-analytics tracks users, sessions, and event breakdowns — a core section of the described app
doc mentions error and report tracking as part of Usage Analysis; feature surfaces and ranks platform errors and powers the Reports app
doc describes Usage Analysis covering function usage; feature measures how often each registered function is called and by whom
doc covers package-level usage tracking; feature shows which packages are most used and provides per-package drilldowns
doc covers the Service Logs app within Usage Analysis; feature streams and summarises server-side service logs
doc describes Usage Analysis recording UI interaction; click-tracking records and visualises UI element click events across the platform
doc mentions data source usage tracking; feature ranks connections, data sources, and SQL queries by usage frequency

doc describes the platform learning from observed user behavior; user-session-analytics captures the aggregate user activity that drives this feedback loop
doc frames self-learning through UI interaction patterns; click-tracking records UI element interactions enabling the same analysis

doc describes how semantic types work; feature tests 'registration and invocation of custom semantic-type detectors that classify column content at runtime'

tags doc covers entity metadata and how objects can be searched by tags; ui-navigation-metadata tests 'entity tags, favorites, and entity collections'
